entry.title: New IDC VA11816D1028 awarded to VETERANS EZ INFO INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF TRANSFORMATION TWENTY ONE TOTAL TECHNOLOGY NEXT GENERATION (T4NG) BASIC CONTRACT

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA11816D1028 (P00001) awarded to VETERANS EZ INFO INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF TRANSFORMATION TWENTY ONE TOTAL TECHNOLOGY NEXT GENERATION (T4NG) BASIC CONTRACT P0001 DID THE FOLLOWING: (1) REVISED PRICE SCHEDULE, (2) INCORPORATED REVISED PWS, (3) INCORPORATED ADDITIONAL CLAUSES, (4) INCORPORATED AND UPDATED ATTACHMENT 0003, AND (5) MADE AN ADMINISTRATIVE CORRECTION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
